description: Add bidirectional integration between Permohonan Dana / Dana Masuk pages and their respective Forecast pages. On Permohonan Dana, add a 'Forecast Pembayaran' button. On Dana Masuk, add a 'Forecast Penerimaan' button. On Forecast pages, add action buttons for overdue/due items that allow admin to directly create a Permohonan Dana or Dana Masuk entry pre-filled with the forecast item data.
steps: In renderPermohonanDana() (line ~6131 in keuangan-app.js), add a 'Lihat Forecast Pembayaran' button in the page header area (after the page-title div). The button should call navigate('monitor-forecast-bayar'). Also add a small summary showing count of overdue forecast items.

In renderDanaMasuk() (line ~6410 in keuangan-app.js), add a 'Lihat Forecast Penerimaan' button in the page header area (after the page-title div). The button should call navigate('monitor-forecast-terima'). Also add a small summary showing count of overdue forecast items.

In renderForecastWithChart() (line ~3023 in keuangan-app.js), modify the table rows to add an action column. For items that are overdue (jatuhTempo < today), add a button: 'Ajukan Permohonan Dana' (for forecast bayar) or 'Catat Dana Masuk' (for forecast terima). The button should call a new function that navigates to the respective page and pre-fills form data.

Create a new function prefillPermohonanFromForecast(nama, ref, sisa, jatuhTempo) that navigates to 'dana-permohonan' and after a short delay fills in the form fields (pd-pemohon, pd-nopo, pd-nominal, pd-jt, pd-ket) with the forecast item data.

Create a new function prefillDanaMasukFromForecast(nama, ref, sisa, jatuhTempo) that navigates to 'dana-masuk' and after a short delay fills in the form fields (dm-sumber, dm-ref, dm-nominal, dm-tgl, dm-ket) with the forecast item data.
In the Forecast Pembayaran page, add a 'Buka Permohonan Dana' navigation button in the page header. In the Forecast Penerimaan page, add a 'Buka Dana Masuk' navigation button in the page header.
Pass the chartId ('bayar' or 'terima') context through to the table row rendering so that the correct prefill function is called based on which forecast page is being viewed.
acceptance_criteria: Permohonan Dana page shows a 'Forecast Pembayaran' button that navigates to the forecast page
Dana Masuk page shows a 'Forecast Penerimaan' button that navigates to the forecast page
Forecast Pembayaran page shows action buttons on overdue items to create Permohonan Dana
Forecast Penerimaan page shows action buttons on overdue items to create Dana Masuk
Clicking an action button on an overdue forecast item navigates to the correct page and pre-fills the form with the item data
Forecast pages have navigation buttons back to Permohonan Dana / Dana Masuk respectively
The integration is bidirectional - users can navigate between forecast and transaction pages seamlessly
verification: Read the modified keuangan-app.js and verify: (1) renderPermohonanDana returns HTML with a forecast button, (2) renderDanaMasuk returns HTML with a forecast button, (3) renderForecastWithChart includes action buttons for overdue items, (4) prefillPermohonanFromForecast and prefillDanaMasukFromForecast functions exist and correctly populate form fields
findings: Review fixes applied: (1) XSS - replaced inline onclick handlers with data-* attributes and document-level event delegation, with proper HTML entity escaping for all special characters. (2) setTimeout race - replaced 300ms fixed delay with polling via waitForElement helper (50ms interval, 3s max). (3) Duplicate DB reads - reused already-fetched 'list' variable in both renderPermohonanDana and renderDanaMasuk instead of re-fetching from KDB. (4) Input events - added setInputValue helper that dispatches 'input' event after setting .value, triggering formatNominalInput and any validation. node --check passes.
